overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through Night City at dusk. The journey begins in a residential hillside area, transitions to a palm-lined boulevard with views of futuristic skyscrapers, passes through a tunnel, and continues through dense downtown intersections with elevated highways and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential hillside transitioning to commercial boulevard

events.description: driving from residential hillside area onto main palm-lined boulevard with city views

agents.ego_description: navigating through winding residential streets and merging onto main arterial road

entered.detail: small houses built into hillside with varied architecture
cylindrical digital billboard structure with rotating advertisements
tall palm trees lining the boulevard
wooden utility poles with overhead power lines

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a residential hillside area with small houses and utility poles, then transitions onto a wider palm-lined boulevard. A large cylindrical billboard structure becomes visible on the right as the vehicle approaches the main city thoroughfare.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined urban boulevard with distant skyline

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead in the distance
approaching tunnel entrance as road descends

agents.ego_description: cruising along the boulevard at steady speed, approaching tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: car ahead maintaining distance in same lane

entered.detail: tall glass and steel towers with illuminated windows and holographic displays
tower with large holographic advertisement projections
underpass entrance with concrete walls and overhead lighting

segments.scene_description: Driving along a wide palm-lined boulevard with clear views of the futuristic city skyline ahead. Flying vehicles are visible in the sky. The road gradually descends toward a tunnel entrance while other cars maintain traffic flow.

events.description: entering tunnel, transition from natural dusk light to artificial overhead lighting
exiting tunnel into downtown area with elevated highways

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed through the tunnel, following traffic

entered.detail: concrete tunnel walls with vertical ribbed texture
linear fluorescent lights mounted on tunnel ceiling
red illuminated street sign indicating Crestmont district

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a concrete tunnel with artificial lighting, transitioning from the open boulevard to an enclosed underpass. Upon exiting, the scene opens into a dense downtown area with complex elevated highway structures and illuminated street signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown intersection with elevated infrastructure

events.description: passing through major intersection with traffic lights changing from red to green
vehicle navigates left turn around large central building structure

agents.ego_description: navigating through busy downtown intersections, following traffic signals and other vehicles

notable_agents.action: black car ahead braking at traffic light then accelerating

entered.detail: massive dark structure with red illuminated windows and industrial architecture
red illuminated street sign for Valencia street
large digital advertisement screens with bright neon colors
overhead gantry with traffic signals and directional signs

segments.scene_description: Driving through dense downtown intersections with massive futuristic buildings and complex elevated highway infrastructure. The vehicle navigates through traffic lights passing under overpasses, with neon billboards and holographic advertisements illuminating the scene. Pedestrians are visible on sidewalks and crossing streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a quiet residential hillside into the neon-drenched density of a futuristic downtown core. It begins among small houses and utility poles before transitioning onto a wide, palm-lined boulevard where a large cylindrical billboard appears and flying vehicles drift across the skyline. As the road descends, the open vista narrows into a concrete tunnel with artificial lighting, momentarily enclosing the view. The scene then opens abruptly upon exiting the underpass, shifting into a complex urban landscape of elevated highways and illuminated street signs. Finally, the camera navigates through dense downtown intersections, passing under massive overpasses and holographic advertisements while weaving through traffic and pedestrians.
